title: Simple Quarries
description: SQ is a mod which adds non-destructive quarries to your world!
body:
### **Welcome to Simple Quarries: Elevate Your Resource Gathering Experience.**
### 


Are you looking to optimize your mining endeavors in a manner that respects the intrinsic balance of the game?

Simple Quarries provides a sophisticated yet intuitive approach to automated ore extraction.



## Automatic Item Storage:
## 
Will automatically place items into block storages above the quarry or else it will spit them out, as per usual.

(works with iron chests mod)

 

## Progressive Tier System:
## 
Begin your journey with a Simple Quarry and progressively unlock more advanced tiers, each offering increased efficiency and speed.

 

## Area-Based Efficiency:
## 
Our quarries are designed to operate optimally by analyzing the ore content within a given area. This ensures resource-focused mining, minimizing the extraction of undesired materials.

 

## Level-Dependent Functionality:
## 
As you advance in your gameplay, your quarry evolves in its operational capabilities. Higher-level quarries offer faster ore extraction rates, enhancing your overall productivity. You may also choose between a few upgrades to use in your adventure.

 

## Sustainability:
## 
Simple Quarries emphasizes sustainability as a challenge. Each quarry's lifespan and efficiency are directly correlated with the tier and upgrade amount, following logarithmic and organic ratios.

 

## Vanilla+ Compatibility:
## 
The mod is designed to integrate into vanilla and modded Minecraft, enriching your gameplay experience without disrupting the established mechanics.

 

## Mod Compatibility:
## 
The quarry can mine any block with "ore" as its suffix, you may also edit this file at this location,
\simplequarries-X.X.X-neoforge-1.21.4.jar\data\simplequarries\tags\block\ores.json
to add whatever block you wish for it to mine.
 

Experience the next level of automated mining with Simple Quarries.
